description:
### 1. Overall Layout
The figure is a clean, academic 2D vertical bar chart designed for a compact, single-column layout. The chart employs a crisp Cartesian coordinate system with a vertical Y-axis on the left and a horizontal X-axis at the bottom. A neatly organized legend is positioned in the upper-left area, ensuring it does not overlap the data bars or reference line. The overall background is strictly pure white, devoid of any gradients, textures, or structural gridlines, adhering to a minimalist scientific aesthetic.

### 2. Components (Axes and Bars)
**Y-Axis:**
*   A crisp, dark charcoal vertical line on the left.
*   **Label:** "Precision@2" rendered in a clean sans-serif font, rotated 90 degrees counter-clockwise, and centered alongside the axis.
*   **Scale & Ticks:** Ranges from 0.00 to 0.40, with subtle tick marks and verbatim numeric labels at: 0.00, 0.05, 0.10, 0.15, 0.20, 0.25, 0.30, 0.35, and 0.40.

**X-Axis:**
*   A crisp, dark charcoal horizontal line at y=0.
*   Features seven categorical tick marks. The labels for these ticks are rotated 30 degrees counter-clockwise to ensure clean legibility without overlapping.

**Data Bars (Left to Right):**
*   **Bar 1:** Height corresponding to y=0.023. Fill color is a **soft, pale grey**. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar (whisker) spanning ±0.006. The exact text "0.023" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "Random".
*   **Bar 2:** Height corresponding to y=0.080. Fill color is a **soft, muted coral-peach**. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar spanning ±0.016. The exact text "0.080" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "TrustScore-Uniform (ablation)".
*   **Bar 3:** Height corresponding to y=0.152. Fill color is a **cool, desaturated medium grey**. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar spanning ±0.005. The exact text "0.152" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "Entity-overlap (ours)".
*   **Bar 4:** Height corresponding to y=0.187. Fill color is a **cool, desaturated medium grey**. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar spanning ±0.020. The exact text "0.187" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "BM25".
*   **Bar 5:** Height corresponding to y=0.198. Fill color is a **cool, desaturated medium grey**. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar spanning ±0.019. The exact text "0.198" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "TF-IDF".
*   **Bar 6:** Height corresponding to y=0.312. Fill color is a **cool, desaturated medium grey**. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar spanning ±0.035. The exact text "0.312" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "SBERT".
*   **Bar 7:** Height corresponding to y=0.345. Fill color is a **deep, muted teal**, distinguished by a prominently thicker dark charcoal outline compared to the other bars. Centered vertical dark charcoal error bar spanning ±0.032. The exact text "0.345" is printed directly above the error bar. X-axis label: "TrustScore-Learned (ours)".

### 3. Connections and Reference Lines
*   **Horizontal Reference Line:** A straight, horizontal dashed line rendered in medium grey, originating precisely at y=0.312 on the Y-axis and extending completely across the chart to the right edge.
*   **Annotation:** The text "SBERT baseline" is placed immediately above this dashed line, aligned to the left (just right of the Y-axis), ensuring it does not overlap with the data bars or error whiskers.

### 4. Groupings and Legend
A neatly formatted legend box with a delicate, soft grey border, positioned in the top-left corner, detailing the color mapping and chart elements:
*   Deep muted teal square icon: "TrustScore-Learned (our proposed method)"
*   Soft muted coral-peach square icon: "TrustScore-Uniform (our ablation condition)"
*   Cool desaturated medium grey square icon: "informed baselines (Entity-overlap, BM25, TF-IDF, SBERT)"
*   Soft pale grey square icon: "Random baseline"
*   Horizontal dashed grey line icon: "SBERT baseline reference at y=0.312"
*   Vertical line with horizontal top/bottom caps (whisker icon): "plus-minus one standard deviation across 3 seeds"

### 5. Labels and Annotations
All text must be rendered verbatim, letter-perfect, and case-sensitive:
*   *Axis Titles:* Precision@2
*   *X-Axis Categories:* Random, TrustScore-Uniform (ablation), Entity-overlap (ours), BM25, TF-IDF, SBERT, TrustScore-Learned (ours)
*   *Bar Values:* 0.023, 0.080, 0.152, 0.187, 0.198, 0.312, 0.345
*   *Annotations:* SBERT baseline
*   *(All legend entries as specified in Section 4)*

### 6. Styling
*   **Background:** Pure white with absolutely no gradients, vignettes, background gridlines, or drop shadows.
*   **Typography:** All text must be a highly legible, neutral sans-serif font (such as Helvetica, Arial, or Inter), sized appropriately for clear reading in a standard publication format. No bolding except where standard for axis titles; no italics, no 3D bevels, and no glows.
*   **Bar Styling:** Flat, 2D rectangular bars. Bars 1 through 6 have a thin, consistent dark charcoal stroke. Bar 7 (deep muted teal) has a distinctively thicker dark charcoal stroke to highlight the proposed method. The bottoms of the bars sit perfectly flush on the x-axis with sharp corners, while the top corners may be very slightly softened to align with modern aesthetic guidelines.
*   **Color Palette:** Muted, print-safe, and colorblind-aware. Specifically utilizing natural, flat tones: soft pale grey, cool desaturated medium grey, soft muted coral-peach, and deep muted teal.
*   **Error Bars:** Rendered as crisp, solid dark charcoal vertical lines with small, flat horizontal crossbars (caps) at the top and bottom of the standard deviation range.
